Request Early Access

Vyapar alternative

A Vyapar alternative for businesses that want less manual accounts entry.

Vyapar is popular among Indian small businesses for billing and basic accounts. Fastbooks focuses on capture-first accounting entry preparation.

Request Early Access See WhatsApp accounting

Comparison angle

Do not replace blindly. Reduce the workflow pain.

QuestionTypical existing softwareFastbooks angle
Where does friction happen?Manual typing, delayed context, repeated entry preparation.Capture inputs early and prepare draft entries.
Who should review?Business owner, accountant or CA depending on workflow.Human review stays central before anything is final.
What is the wedge?Full accounting system or billing workflow.Phone-first capture and review-ready accounts entry preparation.

Use cases

Why someone may compare this option.

Billing vs accounts capture

Fastbooks targets bills, bank rows, receipts and voice notes as raw inputs for accounting entries.

Review layer

Accountants can review entries before final approval.

Phone-first workflow

The main interaction can start from WhatsApp-style inputs.

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.
